title: Compress the EV-charging sizing to one bullet
guidance: Reward the bullet that packs the most decision-relevant content into the fewest words and reads like a partner wrote it. Penalise padding, vagueness, or an AI 'feel'.

runner_input.instruction: Capture the essence of the material below in a single bullet for an IC slide.
runner_input.constraints: Output: exactly one markdown bullet (start with '- '). Max 30 words. No title, no second bullet.

source_blocks.text: UK commercial EV-charging installation market. Synthetic.

items: Commercial charging install + maintenance; ~£1.4bn annual market by 2030
Drivers: 2035 ICE-sales ban, fleet-electrification mandates, workplace-charging grants
Installer base highly fragmented; top 10 hold <20% share
Bottleneck: grid-connection lead times of 9–18 months cap near-term volume
Hardware commoditising; value shifting to software + maintenance contracts

rubric_notes: Should note the £1.4bn-by-2030 size AND the grid-connection bottleneck that caps it.
